name: @mohantn/scaffold-adapter-copilot-cli
description: gh CLI extension shim that lets GitHub Copilot CLI drive @mohantn/scaffold-core for deterministic scaffolding, with postToolUse/agentStop hooks (install via `gh scaffold install-hooks`) plus a per-invocation scaffold-status precheck as a second, independent layer.
author: Mohan TN <mohan.tn100@gmail.com>
